title: Fear of Steel
description: Mod that adds steel and fun ways to use it
body:
# Fear of Steel mod
Introduces a new crafting system to Minecraft, centered around the Burning Furnace, a specialized furnace that unlocks advanced metallurgy. With this mod, players can craft new materials, powerful steel weapons and a unique flintlock firearm.

![Flintlock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee1ec468d6d3211c260d07376bf9ec229bdce19c.png)

## Credit
Special thanks to Kaupenjoe for his tutorials - they really helped me make this mod
